ops.body: Sweep executed 2026-07-10: 20/21 green in one workflow run (zero agent errors) — all repos now carry .claude/fragments/cc-guides.lock @ v0.1.13 with the manifest spec, version-free markers, explicit [sources.cc-skills], daily cron, setup-go check-latest fleet-wide, go 1.26.5 bumps incl. cc-squash's nested go/go.mod and both literal CI pins (cc-review, cc-squash). cc-context was correctly BLOCKED by the equivalence gate: importing cc-skills:install-binary-latest would have (1) flipped pinned→latest (breaking the plugin.json pin contract release.yml's verify-plugin-version depends on), (2) dropped ensure_rg ripgrep auto-provisioning, (3) dropped the pre-v0.5.0 migration shim. Resolution in flight: LOCAL fragment adoption — cc-context keeps its exact script body as .claude/fragments/plugin/scripts/install-binary.sh/install-binary.fragment.sh (no shared import), render-managed + lock-registered, byte-identical behavior, canonical stamp retired.
